subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-08
subcodes.first_line: Although our assembly tonight at this table numbers only ten outwardly... Praise be to God, your hearts are overflowing with the Love of God... Rest assured in the fact that the breath of the Holy Spirit will aid you, - provided no doubts obtain in your hearts. Know this for a certainty.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
